rationale: The cited paper is a close methodological and empirical predecessor: it estimates brand-level short/long-run price elasticities using error-correction models, which closely overlaps with the citing paper’s stage-1 elasticity modeling setup. The citing note explicitly says it extends a mostly North-Atlantic, price-focused evidence base, and the cited study is exactly such UK price-elasticity evidence, so this is plausibly a substantive benchmark/foundation rather than an incidental mention.
